'''rabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:irreconcilably|irreconcilably]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-b-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:irreconcilably|irreconcilably]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:rabate|rabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rabatesher|rabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rabatesherĂ«m|rabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rabatero|rabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rabateshĂ«|rabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rabateshĂ«m|rabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirabatero|gokirabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirabateshĂ«|gokirabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirabateshĂ«m|gokirabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorabankerom|gorabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorabankeshĂ«|gorabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorabankeshĂ«m|gorabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorabankeya|gorabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rabaterom|rabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rabatemu|rabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rabateya|rabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirabaterom|gokirabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirabatemu|gokirabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirabateya|gokirabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:rababate|rababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rababatesher|rababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rababatesherĂ«m|rababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rababatero|rababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rababateshĂ«|rababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rababateshĂ«m|rababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirababatero|gokirababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirababateshĂ«|gokirababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirababateshĂ«m|gokirababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorababankerom|gorababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorababankeshĂ«|gorababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorababankeshĂ«m|gorababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorababankeya|gorababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rababaterom|rababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rababatemu|rababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rababateya|rababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirababaterom|gokirababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirababatemu|gokirababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirababateya|gokirababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠbĂŠte|rĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠbĂŠtesher|rĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠbĂŠtero|rĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠbĂŠtero|gokirĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠbĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠbĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠbĂŠterom|rĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠbĂŠtemu|rĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠbĂŠteya|rĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠbĂŠterom|gokirĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠbĂŠteya|gokirĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafbafte|rafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafbaftesher|rafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafbaftesherĂ«m|rafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafbaftero|rafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafbafteshĂ«|rafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafbafteshĂ«m|rafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafbaftero|gokirafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafbafteshĂ«|gokirafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafbafteshĂ«m|gokirafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafbafnkerom|gorafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafbafnkeshĂ«|gorafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafbafnkeshĂ«m|gorafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafbafnkeya|gorafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafbafterom|rafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafbaftemu|rafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafbafteya|rafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafbafterom|gokirafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafbaftemu|gokirafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafbafteya|gokirafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
